depths-raw.description: CasMVSNet raw depth maps; extracts to ds/Depths/ (scanN and scanN_train).

dtu.description: Small DTU subset (Rectified: scan31, scan31_train, scan114; Depths: scan114) for smoke tests.
dtu.provenance: Subset assembled from DTU preprocessed data.

llff.description: nerf_llff_data: fern, flower, fortress, horns, leaves, orchids, room, trex.

mvs-training.description: DTU preprocessed training images and depths (Rectified/scanN_train, Depths/scanN_train) + shared Cameras.
mvs-training.provenance: DTU training data, Google Drive (MVSNeRF preprocessing of MVSNet https://github.com/YoYo000/MVSNet). NOTE: the generalization 'dtu' loader also needs plain Depths/scanN from the 'depths-raw' dataset.

rs-dtu.description: rs_dtu/DTU test scans + Cameras. Includes dtu_example.zip (restored as the file ds/dtu_example.zip, not extracted).
rs-dtu.provenance: rs_dtu (MVSNeRF). dtu_example.zip from Hugging Face apchen/MVSNeRF.
